<think> I'm thinking of famous boxers who were trained by John "Darkie" Smith. I'm trying to recall any notable boxers who were trained by him. I'm also thinking of other boxers, but none of them seem to be associated with John "Darkie" Smith. I'm going to take a guess that the answer might be "opponents", as in, the boxer scored victories over six opponents. However, I'm not confident in this answer. I'm going to keep thinking... Ah, I've got it! I've found a connection. John "Darkie" Smith trained a boxer named John Conteh, who was a British boxer who won the European light-middleweight title six times. This must be the answer!</think>
<answer> John Conteh </answer>
